id.description: A UUID string identifying this agent application.

message.description: User message to deliver to the agent. Required for `run` (starts the session) and `send` (appends to it); ignored for `cancel` / `listen`.

rest.description: Ingress sub-path under the agent slug. One of: `run`, `send`, `cancel`, `listen`.

revision_id.description: Target draft revision. Must belong to this application and not be live.

session_id.description: Target session id for `send` — the running session to append the message to. Omit for `run` (a fresh session is created).
